zh: 茂密的树木，能使周围的伐木场获得木头收入，可改造为伐木场
en: Dense trees can increase the wood income of surrounding logging camps
column4: and can be converted into logging camps.

zh: 周围每有一个麦田地块，食物产量+{adj_food}
en: Grants +{adj_food} Food for each adjacent Wheat.

zh: 道路用来连接整个物流系统，生产建筑必须与道路向邻才能工作，道路放置时需要花费额外石头，花费量与距离总部的距离有关
每回合自动产生探险家，可用于抽取自然地块
en: Explorers are automatically generated each round and can be used to extract natural tiles.

zh: 一座市场，会根据周围海岸地块的数量增加交易点数
en: A market will increase the number of trading points based on the number of surrounding coast tile.

zh: 一座精炼炉，通过消耗石头和木头生产金属
en: Metal is produced by consuming stone and wood.
